title: DC Comics Batman Activity Coloring Book with Stickers for Boys Ages 3 and Up
description:
Is your child obsessed with superheroes? This officially licensed Marvel coloring book features superheroes from the hit comic book and movie franchise - The Incredible Hulk, Thor, Black Widow, and more! The large activity book is the perfect size for occupying your child during long car rides and travel. It will easily fit inside most standard backpacks, book bags, or binders for even more on-the-go fun. It also comes with a sheet of stickers for additional stationery options. The Avengers coloring book comes with different pages for coloring, puzzles, and games like connect the dots, matching, counting, and more. Activity books are great for encouraging creativity and imagination while kids learn about math and drawing

DC Comics Batman Activity Coloring Book with Stickers for Boys Ages 3 and Up

Unleash your child’s creativity with this action-packed Batman Activity Coloring Book featuring their favorite superhero from DC Comics! Designed for boys ages 3 and up, this exciting set is filled with coloring pages, puzzles, mazes, and games that will keep kids entertained for hours.

Key Features

  • ACTION-PACKED ACTIVITIES - Includes coloring pages, puzzles, mazes, and games featuring Batman and the Justice League.
  • MOTIVATIONAL REWARD STICKERS - Comes with fun Batman-themed stickers perfect for chore charts, class rewards, and positive reinforcement.
  • DESIGNED FOR YOUNG SUPERHEROES - Ideal for boys ages 3 and up who love Batman and imaginative play.
  • GREAT FOR HOME OR CLASSROOM - Perfect as party favors, classroom prizes, or quiet time entertainment.
  • OFFICIAL DC COMICS PRODUCT - Features authentic Batman and Justice League artwork for hours of superhero fun.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 274782
  • UPC: 805219165317
  • Color: Multi-Color
  • Size: One Size

The set also includes Batman reward stickers—perfect for motivating and encouraging good behavior with fun, heroic flair. Whether you're using them for chore charts, classroom rewards, party favors, or just everyday fun, these stickers featuring Batman and the Justice League will be a hit.

A great gift for young Batman fans, this activity book and sticker set offers imaginative play, skill-building, and non-stop superhero excitement—all in one!
